originalFeedback.description: The original raw feedback, complaint, or evaluation text.
originalFeedback.title: Original Feedback

improvedFeedback.description: The feedback refined by SCDFT with total clarity, honesty, and structured, professional language.
improvedFeedback.title: Improved Feedback

status.description: The success or failure status of the processing (e.g., 'success' or 'error').
status.title: Status

timestamp.description: The processing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

auditHash.description: SHA-256 hash of originalFeedback + improvedFeedback + timestamp for audit trail and EU AI Act compliance.
auditHash.title: Audit Hash

download_docx.description: URL to download the improved feedback as a Microsoft Word (.docx) file.
download_docx.title: Download DOCX

download_pdf.description: URL to download the improved feedback as a PDF file.
download_pdf.title: Download PDF
